judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only queried package_database.packageinfo for NPM packages with 'MIT' in Licenses and IsRelease true, got an empty result, and prematurely returned “no packages,” never joining to the project_database nor filtering by project license or extracting fork counts, so its plan could not produce the requested top-5 projects.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-9830804491264076248), the agent used brittle string parsing of Project_Information (e.g., splitting on " is hosted" and regex "and (\d+) forks") to extract ProjectName and ForkCount, which missed many entries formatted differently (e.g., "forks count of 7109"), leading to an incorrect top-5 list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly filtered by the package license (in execute_python call function-call-2096362364116595078 using packageinfo.Licenses) and never applied the required filter on the project license from project_info (later only parsing forks from Project_Information in function-call-821808308973710644), leading to an incorrect top-5 list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misinterpreted the requirement by filtering on package license (packageinfo.Licenses) rather than project license (project_info.Licenses) and additionally limited/only executed a subset of the necessary joins (e.g., get_project_names_in_batches with max_batches=10 and only two subsequent project_packageversion queries), leading to an incomplete and incorrect top-5 derived from a small slice of data, as seen in the trace.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered by the package's Licenses field in package_database.packageinfo (query_db call function-call-17602563485509606638) instead of the project's license in project_database.project_info, resulting in the wrong candidate set and thus incorrect top projects and fork counts.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
